arts.ttl: Tottenham drop James Maddison clue amid triple team news hint before Manchester United clash
arts.sum: Postecoglou continued: "Of the longer-term [injuries], Destiny is back in team training as well, which is good. James Maddison, Guglielmo Vicario and Kevin Danso are among the Tottenham men who have posted pre-match graphics on their Instagram stories, hinting that they may start against Ruben Amorim's team.
